Hearsay: Saw people on a Discord server complaining recently about this issue on 8.11.2025 which was 4 days ago, they solved it the same way I did. also here on Reddit: https://reddit.com/r/SteamDeck/comments/1ouup8k/marvel_rivals_crashes_at_launch/ and also saw somewhere that it works for somebody using debian

Fixed it by reverting to Proton 9.04 via Steam. Game now launches with "outdated driver" and "outdated Windows 10 version" notices. Runs on normal FPS
